meta.project: Ranga Farms Goat Farm Management System

product_overview: Ranga Farms is a Flask-based goat farm management system that centralizes authentication, livestock records, and operational visibility for farm staff. It replaces paper logs and spreadsheets with a digital workflow for secure access, daily dashboards, and herd management.
core_goals: Provide secure user registration and login with optional OTP/MFA verification.
Enable farm staff to view operational dashboards and manage livestock records digitally.
Support fast search and entry of goat records to improve daily farm operations.
Lay the foundation for broader farm workflow digitization across livestock and management tasks.

features.name: Authentication and MFA
features.description: Allows new users to register, existing users to log in, and OTP-based MFA to verify login access before entering the system.
user_flows: POST /register with valid user details -> Receive 200/201 confirming account creation -> POST /login with correct username and password -> Receive 200 with authenticated session or login success response -> POST /mfa/verify-login with valid OTP -> Receive 200 confirming MFA verification and access granted

POST /register with an email/username that already exists -> Receive 409 or validation error indicating the account cannot be created -> POST /login with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 unauthorized response -> POST /mfa/verify-login with an invalid or expired OTP -> Receive 400/401 indicating verification failed

features.name: Livestock Management
features.description: Provides access to the goat directory, dashboard metrics, and the ability to add new livestock records for goat farm operations.
user_flows: POST /login with valid credentials -> Receive authenticated access -> GET /dashboard with active session -> Receive 200 with dashboard metrics and alerts -> GET /records with active session -> Receive 200 with livestock directory results -> POST /add_record with valid goat data -> Receive 200/201 confirming the new livestock record was saved

POST /login with valid credentials -> Receive authenticated access -> GET /dashboard without valid authentication -> Receive 401 unauthorized response -> GET /records with missing or invalid session -> Receive 401 forbidden/unauthorized response -> POST /add_record with incomplete or invalid goat data -> Receive 400 validation error indicating required fields are missing

features.name: Authentication and MFA
features.description: User authentication, registration, login/logout, and MFA OTP enrollment/verification.

features.name: Livestock Management
features.description: Manage goat records, births, categories, and tags.

endpoints.description: View dashboard metrics and quick links
